contract.ai.helper: Send a message or attach a file. The agent will detect the input type and update the protocol.

contract.ai.summary.title: AI summary
contract.ai.comments.title: AI comments
contract.ai.placeholder: Describe the client request or attach a file for analysis.

contract.branch.points.desc: Use clause numbers and client wording.

contract.finalize.title: Finish working on the document?
contract.finalize.text: After completion, only the Final Document tab will remain. Editing will be disabled.
